body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Remove the file `experiments/ClimaEarth/input/bucket_ic_august.nc`, which was originally added for DYAMOND simulations and is no longer needed. We still keep the config file option `bucket_initial_condition`.

Closes #1426

title: remove August bucket IC file
